title: HomeworkHelper
description: A plugin which helps you with your hw using AI
body:
HomeworkHelper: In-Game Homework Assistance for Students

HomeworkHelper transforms Minecraft into an educational hub where players can get instant help with their academic questions without leaving the game. Powered by Ollama's AI capabilities, this plugin offers students a seamless way to overcome challenging homework problems while maintaining the immersive Minecraft experience.

Key Features

✨ Simple Chat Integration

Just type "HW" followed by your question directly in the game chat

No complicated commands to remember - quick and intuitive

Example: "HW What is photosynthesis and how does it work?"

🧠 Intelligent Assistance

Leverages Ollama's AI models to provide accurate, helpful responses

Explains concepts clearly with appropriate detail level for students

Supports questions across all academic subjects: math, science, literature, history, and more

🔒 Customizable Access Controls

Server administrators can control which players can access the helper

Permission-based system integrates with existing server permissions

Option to enable for everyone or limit to specific roles/groups

⚙️ Flexible Configuration

Choose from different AI models based on your server's needs

Adjust response length and detail level to suit your community

Configure custom prefix and messaging to match your server's style

💻 Easy Setup

Simple installation process for server administrators

Works with your existing Ollama setup

Minimal resource usage on your Minecraft server

📱 In-Game Experience

Get answers directly inside Minecraft - no need to alt-tab or leave the game

Responses are formatted for optimal readability in the Minecraft chat

Study while playing - perfect for educational servers or study breaks

This plugin bridges the gap between gaming and education, providing a valuable resource that encourages learning within the Minecraft environment. Whether you're running an educational server, a community for students, or simply want to provide additional resources to your players, HomeworkHelper creates an environment where academic growth and gaming can coexist.

By integrating this tool into your server, you're not just enhancing gameplay - you're offering a genuine educational resource that can help students succeed academically while enjoying their favorite game.
